description: obsidian-operator harness-level enforcement hooks. (1) preflight-enforce.sh: when /daily-init is invoked, checks the vault for missing weekly review / AI weekly digest / monthly pulse / quarterly review / quarterly plan and injects <system-reminder> additionalContext forcing the missing skill(s) to run first (regression observed 2026-05-01 + 2026-05-02 — April Monthly Pulse missed for 2 consecutive days). (2) deep-research-enforce.sh: when /deep-research is invoked, injects <system-reminder> additionalContext forcing Step 4 parallel agent dispatch instead of silent main-thread research (regression observed 2026-05-02 — Codex CLI ran ~10 main-thread web searches without spawn_agent calls and without the documented sequential-fallback notice).
